title: EVM Cost and Schedule Variance Visualization
description: Interactive Chart.js visualization of Earned Value Management. Plots PV, EV, and AC curves over a 12-month project and computes CV, SV, CPI, SPI, and EAC live as a cursor slides along the timeline. Three preset scenarios compare healthy and unhealthy project states.
creator: Dan McCreary
subject: Information Systems
Project Management
Earned Value Management
learningObjectives: Compute CV, SV, CPI, SPI, and EAC from PV, EV, and AC
Interpret what each metric says about project health
Diagnose project status from the visual relationship of the three curves
Forecast final cost (EAC) given current performance trend
prerequisites: Familiarity with project schedules and budgets
assumptions: Linear interpolation between monthly data points
limitations: Three fixed scenarios; no user-supplied project data
EAC uses simple BAC/CPI formula (no risk-adjusted variants)
